proven.claim: Proving: global regex lastIndex strictly advances each iteration → loop terminates.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P4
; LINE: 14
; Proving: global regex lastIndex strictly advances each iteration → loop terminates.
; Transition: exec() on a /g regex sets lastIndex = end-of-match after each call
(declare-const lastIndex_before Int)
(declare-const matchEnd Int)
(declare-const lastIndex_after Int)
(declare-const responseLength Int)
; Code model: exec starts from lastIndex_before ≥ 0
(assert (>= lastIndex_before 0))
; Code model: a match ends strictly after it begins (non-empty match)
(assert (> matchEnd lastIndex_before))
(assert (<= matchEnd responseLength))
; Code transition: exec() updates lastIndex to matchEnd
(assert (= lastIndex_after matchEnd))
; Negated property: lastIndex does NOT strictly advance
(assert (not (> lastIndex_after lastIndex_before)))
(check-sat)
